name: FiiO FT1 Pro
houseNotes: House default preamp is +2 dB and the tuning leans loud; combined boosts of roughly +5 dB are tolerated with a warning rather than a rejection. The FT1 Pro planar driver takes the 60 Hz bass shelf cleanly without flab. The 3.2 kHz and 5 kHz peaking cuts are the primary harshness levers — reach for those before touching anything else.
